heading: Operational rule
label: 9920 Operational rule
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , prior to the general amendment of this chapter by .section 679 of Pub. L. 97–35section 9908 of this titlePub. L. 105–285
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , prior to the general amendment of this chapter by .section 679 of Pub. L. 97–35section 9908 of this titlePub. L. 105–285

children.heading: Religious organizations included as nongovernmental providers
children.label: a Religious organizations included as nongovernmental providers
children.text: For any program carried out by the Federal Government, or by a State or local government under this chapter, the government shall consider, on the same basis as other nongovernmental organizations, religious organizations to provide the assistance under the program, so long as the program is implemented in a manner consistent with the Establishment Clause of the first amendment to the Constitution. Neither the Federal Government nor a State or local government receiving funds under this chapter shall discriminate against an organization that provides assistance under, or applies to provide assistance under, this chapter, on the basis that the organization has a religious character.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A religious organization that provides assistance under a program described in subsection (a) shall retain its religious character and control over the definition, development, practice, and expression of its religious beliefs.

children.label: A
children.text: to alter its form of internal governance, except (for purposes of administration of the community services block grant program) as provided in ; orsection 9910 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: to remove religious art, icons, scripture, or other symbols;

children.heading: Employment practices
children.label: 3 Employment practices
children.text: A religious organization’s exemption provided under regarding employment practices shall not be affected by its participation in, or receipt of funds from, programs described in subsection (a).section 2000e–1 of this title

children.heading: Limitations on use of funds for certain purposes
children.label: c Limitations on use of funds for certain purposes
children.text: No funds provided directly to a religious organization to provide assistance under any program described in subsection (a) shall be expended for sectarian worship, instruction, or proselytization.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), any religious organization providing assistance under any program described in subsection (a) shall be subject to the same regulations as other nongovernmental organizations to account in accord with generally accepted accounting principles for the use of such funds provided under such program.

children.heading: Limited audit
children.label: 2 Limited audit
children.text: Such organization shall segregate government funds provided under such program into a separate account. Only the government funds shall be subject to audit by the government.

children.heading: Treatment of eligible entities and other intermediate organizations
children.label: e Treatment of eligible entities and other intermediate organizations
children.text: If an eligible entity or other organization (referred to in this subsection as an “intermediate organization”), acting under a contract, or grant or other agreement, with the Federal Government or a State or local government, is given the authority under the contract or agreement to select nongovernmental organizations to provide assistance under the programs described in subsection (a), the intermediate organization shall have the same duties under this section as the government.
